source.name: Ministerio de Asuntos Exteriores — Student visa

extraSources.name: Ministerio de Universidades — Studying in Spain
SEPIE — Spanish Service for the Internationalisation of Education

requirements.label: Admission to an approved course
requirements.detail: Acceptance to a full-time course at an authorised Spanish institution.

requirements.label: Financial means (IPREM)
requirements.detail: Show at least 100% of the IPREM — about €600/month (≈ €7,200/year). More is required if family members accompany you.

requirements.label: Private health insurance
requirements.detail: Full-coverage private health insurance with no co-payments, from an insurer authorised in Spain.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: Spanish (DELE/SIELE) for Spanish-taught programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the intended stay.

requirements.label: Criminal record certificate
requirements.detail: Required for stays longer than six months (legalised/apostilled).

requirements.label: Medical certificate
requirements.detail: Often required for stays longer than six months.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Evidence of accommodation in Spain may be requested (and can reduce the funds figure if prepaid).

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Spanish number and data on landing.
